shots.research_notes: I located Vori's official website and recorded a close-up of their homepage, highlighting the key tagline and imagery that captures the brand essence. The recording lasts for 2 seconds, encapsulating the startup's identity effectively.

candidates.title: Vori Homepage Recording
candidates.notes: Recorded the Vori homepage showcase with tagline, fitting the shot's intention.

function_calls.name: tavily_search
function_calls.result: {"query":"Vori grocery POS homepage","results":[{"title":"Best Cloud-Based Grocery Point-of-Sale (POS) System | Vori","url":"https://www.vori.com/pos","snippet":"Vori POS keeps grocery checkout fast during the rush with integrated scales, all tender types, loyalty at the lane and real-time pricing. See it in action."},{"title":"Best Grocery Store POS & All-in-One Operations Software | Vori","url":"https://www.vori.com","snippet":"Vori helps independent grocers move faster, increase sales, and protect every penny with modern tools built for how grocery really runs. Vori brings together POS, hardware, pricing automation, order management, shopper engagement, and reporting & insights, so you can execute the winning formula every day. Valley Farm Market partnered with Vori to grow sales, save hours every week, and modernize loyalty without slowing down the store. Vori is a modern grocery point-of-sale system built exclusively for independent grocers, bringing checkout, pricing, ordering, and loyalty into one connected system. Stores use Vori to run stronger operations and save time every day. Vori is built to help you run a more profitable store, protecting margin, reducing manual work, and making everyday decisions easier instead of harder. Vori is a complete grocery operating system that includes point-of-sale, payment processing, shopper engagement, order management, and pricing automation. Vori's team handles the heavy lifting: importing departments and pricing, configuring lanes, and training staff, so your store keeps running while Vori gets you live."},{"title":"Grocery POS Hardware & Checkout Devices | Vori","url":"https://www.vori.com/hardware","snippet":"# Grocery POS hardware, electronic shelf labels, and floor tools for your store. Modern, reliable checkout and floor hardware that keeps lanes moving and makes your store feel up to date. Vori's grocery pos hardware including grocery point of sale system, mobile handheld, and electronic shelf labels. ### Stay in the fast lane with 2x faster checkout. Combine a cashier screen, customer display, payments, and loyalty into one purpose-built grocery POS that keeps checkout moving. Scan items, update pricing, build orders, and check margins directly from the sales floor. Print shelf labels using mobile tag printers or instantly update pricing with electronic shelf labels. ## What the best grocery POS hardware looks like in your store. It includes checkout stations with cashier and customer displays, secure payment terminals, scanner scales, handheld scanners, receipt printers, cash drawers, mobile handheld devices, mobile shelf tag printers, and support for electronic shelf labels. Floor teams use Vori mobile handhelds to scan items, update pricing, and build orders directly from the aisle."},{"title":"Alternative to Toast Grocery POS - Vori","url":"https://www.vori.com/vori-vs-toast","snippet":"Vori, the all-in-one grocery POS system, is purpose-built for grocery stores managing thousands of SKUs, constant price changes, and complex daily operations."},{"title":"The grocery POS built to protect margins and grow sales. - Vori","url":"https://www.vori.com/growth-ads-meta-grocery-pos-s","snippet":"Vori's all-in-one POS and operations software help independent grocery stores streamline ordering, inventory, payments, marketing and more."}],"blocked":false}
